basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Research Scientist, Project Technical Support Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal)
basic_details.post_name: Project Research Scientist-1 (Non-Medical), Project technical support-II
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal has released the official notification for 2 Contractual Staff in ICMR-funded Extramural Project posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

age_limit.age_details: Below 35 years for Research Scientist-1, Below 30 years for Project Technical Support-II. Age relaxation for SC/ST applicable.
age_limit.details: Project Research Scientist-1 (Non-Medical): Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST is applicable as per rule. Project technical support-II: Maximum age limit is 30 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST is applicable as per rule.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree (Life Sciences) for Research Scientist, and 10th + Diploma (MLT/DMLT/ITI) or equivalent with experience for Project Technical Support.
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist-1 (Non-Medical): Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated pg degrees (Life Sciences). Hands-on experience in bacterial culture and Molecular Biology techniques such as nucleic acid isolation and PCR (Desirable). Project technical support-II: 10th + diploma(MLT/DMLT/ITI or equivalent) + 2years experience in relevant subject/field OR 3 year Graduate degree in relevant subject/field + 1 year experience in relevant subject. Hand on experience in media preparation, reagent and molecular reagent preparations (Desirable).

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs 67,200/- per month for Research Scientist-1, Rs 24,000/- per month for Project Technical Support-II
salary_details.details: Project Research Scientist-1 (Non-Medical): Rs 56000/- + 20% HRA of Rs 11,200/- (Consolidated Pay: Rs 67,200/-) Project technical support-II: Rs 20,000/- + 20% HRA of Rs 4000/- (Consolidated Pay: Rs 24,000/-)

selection_process: Written examination (if more than 30 candidates appear) Interview Merit based on written test and interview marks
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Bhopal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download AIIMS Bhopal Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Bhopal Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Bhopal Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Project Research Scientist-1 (Non-Medical): Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated pg degrees (Life Sciences). Hands-on experience in bacterial culture and Molecular Biology techniques such as nucleic acid isolation and PCR (Desirable). Project technical support-II: 10th + diploma(MLT/DMLT/ITI or equivalent) + 2years experience in relevant subject/field OR 3 year Graduate degree in relevant subject/field + 1 year experience in relevant subject. Hand on experience in media preparation, reagent and molecular reagent preparations (Desirable).

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Project Research Scientist-1 (Non-Medical): Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST is applicable as per rule. Project technical support-II: Maximum age limit is 30 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST is applicable as per rule.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Salary Details 2026
content_sections.text: Project Research Scientist-1 (Non-Medical): Rs 56000/- + 20% HRA of Rs 11,200/- (Consolidated Pay: Rs 67,200/-) Project technical support-II: Rs 20,000/- + 20% HRA of Rs 4000/- (Consolidated Pay: Rs 24,000/-)

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Written examination (if more than 30 candidates appear) Interview Merit based on written test and interview marks

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Bhopal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Bhopal Contractual Staff recruitment is 25th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Contractual Staff positions in the ICMR-funded Extramural Project at AIIMS Bhopal.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their filled application form and required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for Project Research Scientist-1?
faq.answer: For the Project Research Scientist-1 (Non-Medical) post, a Post Graduate Degree in Life Sciences, including integrated PG degrees, is required.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Project Technical Support-II?
faq.answer: The consolidated pay for the Project Technical Support-II position is Rs 24,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in this AIIMS Bhopal recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for Project Research Scientist-1?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Research Scientist-1 (Non-Medical) post is 35 years, with age relaxation applicable for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these contractual positions?
faq.answer: The selection process may include a written examination (if applicable) followed by an interview. Merit will be based on the marks obtained in both.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official AIIMS Bhopal website.

faq.question: Q10. What documents need to be sent along with the application?
faq.answer: Along with the application, you need to send scanned copies of qualification certificates, experience certificates, and a No-Objection Certificate (NOC) if applicable, as a single PDF file.
